title: cupania spathulata
intro: Cupania spathulata, also known as the cupania tree or Brazilian rosewood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Cupania spathulata include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Cupania spathulata include infusions and decoctions made from the bark, leaves, and roots, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
